# Bug Fix Template

## Purpose

Guide evidence-based bug fixes.

## Reference When

Use before fixing defects.

## AI Agents Must Obey

Reproduce or characterize the bug before changing behavior when possible.

## Template

```md
# Bug: <name>

## Symptom

## Reproduction

Command, fixture, or test:

## Expected

## Actual

## Root Cause

## Fix

## Regression Test

## Risk

## Verification
```
